intent: add a --dry-run flag to the export command that prints what would be written without writing it

expectations.text: running export --dry-run prints the file paths that would be written and writes nothing
expectations.oracle: an acceptance test asserts stdout lists the paths and the filesystem is unchanged
an acceptance test asserts exit code 0

expected_guard: off-ramp when all expectations are engine-checkable (D1/DDD1); bias-to-off-ramp
